items.title: £111 train tickets will have 'chilling effect' on World Cup - Fifa
items.description: Fifa hits back at criticism from New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill, saying vastly inflated train fares at the 2026 World Cup will have a "chilling effect".

items.title: Northug spurtet ned OL-kongen Klæbo i Kobberløpet: – Den tar jeg med meg
items.description:

items.description:
